description: Reads prospects from Google Sheets, generates personalized outreach emails using Claude AI (Feather HQ email writer), and writes subject + body back to the sheet. Nothing is sent automatically — review the sheet and send manually.
built_for: Feather HQ (featherhq.com) — AI voice agent platform
how_it_works: 1. Add prospects to Google Sheet (Prospects tab) with Status = Pending
3. Claude generates a personalized email per prospect
4. Subject goes to Col K, Body goes to Col L, Status becomes Ready
5. Open the sheet, review the emails, send manually

requirements.python: 3.11 recommended (3.14 will break dependencies — do not use)
google_oauth_needed: credentials.json — OAuth 2.0 Desktop App from console.cloud.google.com
Enable: Google Sheets API + Google Drive API
Add your Gmail as a test user on the OAuth consent screen

setup_steps.title: Clone the repo
setup_steps.notes: Ask the project owner for access to the private GitHub repo

setup_steps.title: Create .env file
setup_steps.notes: Copy .env.example to .env and fill in your Anthropic API key

required_values.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Your Claude API key from console.anthropic.com

setup_steps.title: Get Google OAuth credentials
notes: Enable Google Sheets API and Google Drive API
Go to APIs & Services → Credentials → Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID
Download JSON → rename to credentials.json → place in project root
Go to OAuth consent screen → Test users → add your Gmail

setup_steps.title: Create Google Sheet
setup_steps.notes: A browser will open — sign in with your Gmail and click Allow. The sheet ID will be saved to config automatically.

setup_steps.title: Update calendar link
setup_steps.notes: Replace all instances of https://YOUR_YASH_CALENDAR_LINK_HERE with Yash's actual booking link

setup_steps.title: Add prospects to Google Sheet
notes: Open the sheet created in step 5
Fill in: Company Name (A), Website (B), Contact Email (C), Contact Name (D), Industry (E)
Set Status (N) = Pending for each row
Or use: python tools/manage_google_sheet.py add --name 'Acme' --website 'acme.com' --email 'john@acme.com' --contact 'John Doe' --industry 'Insurance'

google_sheet.name: Cold Email Campaign Tracker
google_sheet.note: This is the original sheet. On a new system, run setup_google_sheet.py to create a fresh one — the new ID will be saved automatically.

key_columns.J: Research Data (optional — paste manual research here)
key_columns.N: Status (set to Pending for new rows)

status_values.Pending: New prospect, email not yet generated
status_values.Ready: Email generated — review cols K & L
status_values.Disqualified: Star rating less than 3 — skipped by email writer

file_structure.tools/run_email_automation.py: Main script — run this to generate emails
file_structure.tools/generate_email.py: Claude email writer with Feather prompt
file_structure.config/email_automation_config.json: All settings — sender info, Feather company details, CTA variations
file_structure.credentials.json: Google OAuth file (never commit this file)
file_structure.token.pickle: Auto-generated after first OAuth login (never commit this file)

files_to_transfer_manually..env: Create fresh on the new system with your own Anthropic API key
files_to_transfer_manually.credentials.json: Download fresh from Google Cloud Console on the new system
files_to_transfer_manually.token.pickle: Auto-generated on first run of setup_google_sheet.py

troubleshooting.access_denied_403: Go to Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → OAuth consent screen → Test users → add your Gmail
troubleshooting.credentials_json_json: Windows sometimes double-adds the extension. Rename credentials.json.json to credentials.json
troubleshooting.no_pending_prospects: Make sure Status column (N) is set to exactly 'Pending' for each row you want processed
troubleshooting.token_expired: Delete token.pickle and run setup_google_sheet.py again to re-authorize
